ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly readable.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Appears to be a scanned/image-based PDF. The OCR text extraction on page 1 is garbled, but the visual document image is readable. Key fields can be identified from the image content.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: The certificate contains 'DC NO. LCOSA195230012'. The letters 'LC' appear as part of a reference number 'LCOSA195230012' — they are followed directly by other letters ('OSA') without any space or separator that would form a separate field label. There is no separate field labeled 'L/C No.', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar. The invoice states 'TERMS OF PAYMENT: Letter of Credit' but this is a payment term on the invoice, not an LC reference on the certificate. Per rule 2.2 (KRITISK REGEL – Krav på banktermskontext), the LC exception is NOT activated because 'LC' in 'LCOSA195230012' is a substring of a reference number, not a separate bank-term label on the certificate.

results.location: Header/company name at top of invoice page
results.context: Invoice header, top-right area of page 1

results.location: Footer/company name at bottom of invoice page

criteria_met.details: Certificate remarks 'SI051095 / CA032883' match invoice INVOICE NO 'SI051095' and OUR REF 'CA032883'.
Certificate consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' matches invoice issuer 'ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB'.
Certificate consignee 'DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED' matches invoice buyer 'DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED'.

consignor.certificate_value: Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, 41380, Göteborg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' found as 'ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB' in invoice header (issuer) and footer. Direct match as invoice issuer.
MATCH - Certificate: Sweden. Invoice header address: 'SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden'. Additionally, VAT No. prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden (rule 4.1.2.1).

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found directly in invoice header as issuer
Country verification via VAT prefix SE and explicit address

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' with country 'Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB' in header with address 'SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden' and VAT No. SE556088563301. After normalization of case, the company names are identical. Country Sweden is confirmed both via explicit address and VAT prefix SE. No further sequential testing needed as 4.1.0 gives direct MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED, FLAT/RM G2,17/F,LEGEND TOWER, NO.7 SHING YIP STREET, KWUN TONG, KL,HK, HONG KONG
consignee.invoice_value: DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED, FLAT/RM G2,17/F,LEGEND TOWER, NO.7 SHING YIP STREET, KWUN TONG, KL,HK, Hong Kong

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains 'BUYER' field with 'DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED'. This is the primary billing/factoring field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice buyer name
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED' exactly matches after case normalization.
MATCH - Certificate: 'HONG KONG'. Invoice buyer address ends with 'Hong Kong'. Per rule 4.6, Hong Kong and China are equivalent, but here both documents state Hong Kong directly.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 - BUYER field identified as primary billing field
Name verification - exact match after case normalization

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED' with address 'FLAT/RM G2,17/F,LEGEND TOWER, NO.7 SHING YIP STREET, KWUN TONG, KL,HK' and country 'HONG KONG'. Invoice buyer: 'DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED' with address 'FLAT/RM G2,17/F,LEGEND TOWER, NO.7 SHING YIP STREET, KWUN TONG, KL,HK' and country 'Hong Kong'. Company names are identical. Addresses are identical. Country matches (HONG KONG = Hong Kong). Clear MATCH on all aspects.

goods_description.certificate_value: NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
goods_description.invoice_value: NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.result: No specific article numbers found in certificate. DC NO. LCOSA195230012 and CONTRACT NO.SO046379 are reference numbers, not article/item numbers. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and match
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Identity-bearing main designation: 'NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP'. This exact text string appears in the invoice description field.

Certificate and invoice both contain identical shipping details: 39 X 40' CONTAINERS, 4056 BALES, GROSS WEIGHT: 1026,675 TONS, NET/AIRDRY WEIGHT: 1014,000 ADMT, DC NO. LCOSA195230012, CONTRACT NO.SO046379. These are consistent.

rules_applied.description: Priority 2 - Controlled text matching. Identity-bearing main designation 'NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP' found exactly in invoice.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description identifies 'NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP' as the product. Invoice description column contains 'NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP'. The identity-bearing main designation is an exact character-for-character match after case normalization. All additional shipping details (containers, bales, weights, references) are also consistent between the two documents. No article numbers are present to verify via Priority 1. MATCH via Priority 2 controlled text matching.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '1014 ADMT' - this is the verification-grounding quantity.
Search for numeric value 1014 in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice quantity column shows '1 014' with unit 'ADMT'. After removal of space as thousands separator (rule 4.4.3.3), this equals 1014. Units match (ADMT).

comparison_steps.description: Invoice uses space as thousands separator: '1 014' → 1014
comparison_steps.result: MATCH after normalization. Both values are integers. The separator is a space which is an allowed thousands separator per 4.4.3.3.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate also states GROSS WEIGHT: 1026,675 TONS and NET/AIRDRY WEIGHT: 1014,000 ADMT in Box 6. Invoice also states GROSS WEIGHT: 1026,675 TONS and NET/AIRDRY WEIGHT: 1014,000 ADMT. These are consistent.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value '1014 ADMT' used as verification-grounding quantity
Direct occurrence check - numeric value 1014 found in invoice quantity column
Thousands separator normalization: '1 014' in invoice normalized to '1014'

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7 states '1014 ADMT'. Invoice quantity column shows '1 014' with unit 'ADMT'. The space in '1 014' is a thousands separator — after normalization per rule 4.4.3.3 (both values are integers, the separator is only in the thousands position), the values are identical: 1014. The unit ADMT also matches exactly. Additionally, both documents contain identical gross weight (1026,675 TONS) and net/airdry weight (1014,000 ADMT) in their respective description areas, confirming consistency. No contradictions found per rule 4.4.3.1. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit country of origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains dedicated field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. This is an explicit origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin with invoice origin after normalization

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field in invoice
Positive verification - origin SWEDEN explicitly identified in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states 'SWEDEN' as country of origin. Invoice has a dedicated field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' with value 'SWEDEN'. This is an exact character match. Single origin in both documents with no conflicting information. Clear MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate contains 'DC NO. LCOSA195230012' where 'LC' is part of a reference number, not a separate LC field label. Invoice payment terms state 'Letter of Credit' but this is on the invoice, not a certificate LC reference. LC exception NOT activated per rule 2.2 critical rule on bank-term context.
Document A is the certificate (Certificate of Origin). Document B is the invoice (Invoice Copy by Elof Hansson Trade AB). Clear separation into two files.

All three criteria met: (1) Certificate remarks SI051095/CA032883 match invoice number SI051095 and ref CA032883. (2) Consignor Elof Hansson Trade AB = invoice issuer. (3) Consignee DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED = invoice buyer.
Consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' found as 'ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB' in invoice header and footer. Direct issuer match.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice: Sweden (explicit in address) and SE prefix in VAT number.
Invoice BUYER field (primary billing field) identified with DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED.
Identity-bearing main designation 'NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP' found exactly in invoice.
Certificate: 1014 ADMT. Invoice: 1 014 ADMT. Match after thousands separator normalization (4.4.3.3).
Invoice '1 014' normalized to '1014' by removing space as thousands separator. Both values are integers.
Explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' field found in invoice.
Certificate: SWEDEN. Invoice: SWEDEN. Exact match.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Elof Hansson Trade AB, mottagaren DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED, varubeskrivningen NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP, kvantiteten 1014 ADMT och ursprungslandet Sweden kan alla verifieras exakt mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_notes: Invoice is marked as 'INVOICE COPY'. The OCR text extraction was garbled but the image content was fully readable.
Certificate references 'DC NO. LCOSA195230012' which contains 'LC' as part of a reference number — this was correctly identified as NOT a Letter of Credit reference.
Invoice payment terms state 'Letter of Credit' — this is a payment method on the invoice, not an LC reference on the certificate.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, 41380, Göteborg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden, VAT No. SE556088563301
sections.rule_applied: Consignor-namn identifierat direkt som fakturautställare i fakturans sidhuvud. Land verifierat via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' identifieras exakt (efter normalisering av versaler/gemener) som 'ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB' i fakturans sidhuvud. Detta är fakturans utställare. Landet Sweden bekräftas av fakturans explicita adress 'SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden' samt VAT-nummer med SE-prefix. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED, FLAT/RM G2,17/F,LEGEND TOWER, NO.7 SHING YIP STREET, KWUN TONG, KL,HK, HONG KONG
sections.invoice_value: DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED, FLAT/RM G2,17/F,LEGEND TOWER, NO.7 SHING YIP STREET, KWUN TONG, KL,HK, Hong Kong
sections.rule_applied: Mottagare identifierad i fakturans primära faktureringsfält (BUYER). Exakt namnmatchning och landöverensstämmelse.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED' matchar exakt fakturans BUYER-fält. Adressen är identisk i båda dokumenten. Landet HONG KONG matchar Hong Kong i fakturan. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
sections.invoice_value: NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (Prioritet 2). Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning identifierad exakt i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP' återfinns tecken för tecken i fakturans varubeskrivningskolumn. Inga artikelnummer att verifiera (Prioritet 1 ej tillämplig). Övriga detaljer (containers, bales, vikter, DC-nummer, kontraktsnummer) är också konsistenta mellan dokumenten. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll med normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (mellanslag).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets Box 7 anger '1014 ADMT'. Fakturans kvantitetskolumn anger '1 014 ADMT'. Mellanslaget i '1 014' är en tusentalsavskiljare som normaliseras bort (regel 4.4.3.3). Båda värden är heltal. Efter normalisering: 1014 = 1014. Enheterna ADMT matchar. Dessutom bekräftar fakturans beskrivningsområde samma vikter (GW 1026,675 TONS, NW 1014,000 ADMT) utan motsägelse. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning mot explicit ursprungsfält i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets Box 3 anger 'SWEDEN' som ursprungsland. Fakturan innehåller ett dedikerat fält 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' med värdet 'SWEDEN'. Exakt teckenmatchning. Inga motstridiga ursprungsuppgifter i fakturan. MATCH.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Dokumentparet är konsistent och uppfyller kraven för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No checkpoint has confidence below 0.85. All motivations align with their respective status values.
